channel.title: INtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Join Our Livestream: The Hype, Reality, and Future of EVs
item.description: Pose your questions to a panel of WIRED experts about the future of the electric vehicle industry.

item.title: Sex toys maker Tenga says hacker stole customer information
item.description: The Japanese sex toy maker said a hacker broke into an employee's inbox and stole customer names, email addresses, and correspondence, including order...

item.title: Fintech lending giant Figure confirms data breach
item.description: The company said hackers downloaded “a limited number of files” after breaking into an employee’s account. The hacking group ShinyHunters took respons...

item.title: Senators Urge Top Regulator to Stay Out of Prediction Market Lawsuits
item.description: As prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi battle regulators in court, Senate Democrats are urging the CFTC to avoid weighing in, escal...

item.title: OpenAI removes access to sycophancy-prone GPT-4o model
item.description: The model is known for its overly sycophantic nature and its role in several lawsuits involving users' unhealthy relationships to the chatbot.

item.title: Record Low Snow in the West Will Mean Less Water, More Fire, and Political Chaos
item.description: Snowpack levels across a wide swath of western US states are among the lowest seen in decades, even as regulators struggle to negotiate water rights i...

item.title: Social Security Workers Are Being Told to Hand Over Appointment Details to ICE
item.description: The recent request goes against decades of precedent and puts noncitizens at further risk of immigration enforcement actions.

item.title: The SEC closed its investigation into Fisker
item.description: The financial regulator revealed in a response to a TechCrunch records request that the probe was closed in September 2025.

item.title: Why top talent is walking away from OpenAI and xAI
item.description: AI companies have been hemorrhaging talent the past few weeks. Half of xAI’s founding team has left the company — some on their own, others through “r...

item.title: 20 Best Presidents' Day Deals on Gear Our Reviewers Actually Used (2026)
item.description: Shop these limited-time sales to save on some of our favorite gadgets from Branch, Eufy, and more.
